infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Coziyoo needs microphone access for voice conversations with the AI agent.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Coziyoo needs your location to show the nearest available cook for selected dishes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Coziyoo needs your location to show the nearest available cook for selected dishes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Coziyoo needs photo library access so you can select a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Coziyoo may save edited profile photos to your library when needed.

plugins.photosPermission: Coziyoo needs photo library access so you can select a profile picture.
